data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for photo annotation, which includes markups, arrows, and text on images. However, the provided use case does not explicitly mention the capability to annotate photos, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. The evidence provided focuses on the creation of reports and photo uploads but lacks any details on the annotation functionality, which is critical for satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of photo annotation capabilities (markups, arrows, text on images).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
